from django.http import JsonResponse
from django.views import View

from .models import Product


class BulkPriceUpdateView(View):
    def post(self, request):
        price_changes = request.POST.getlist("changes")
        updated_ids = []
        for change in price_changes:
            product = Product.objects.get(id=change["product_id"])
            product.price = change["new_price"]
            product.save()
            updated_ids.append(product.id)
        return JsonResponse({"updated": updated_ids})
